notes: Day 25 (Mar 24) UPDATE MIDNIGHT ET. Sources: CNN D25 live, AJ liveblog D25, CBS live, CNBC, AP, Bloomberg, Fortune, OilPrice.com, NPR, NBC, Wikipedia, Investing.com, IAEA, Euronews, Iran International, JPost, Fox News, PBS, WSJ, Haaretz, Israel Hayom, ToI, ABC News, WashPost, Al-Monitor, SCMP, The National, GCaptain, FDD LWJ, Goldman Sachs, IEA, NetBlocks, Gulf News, Newsweek, Middle East Eye, Times of Israel, Daily Post Nigeria, Polyester Time, TradingEconomics, Alma Center, bne IntelliNews, Freedom House, Chatham House, HRANA, ACLED, ad-hoc-news.

TRUMP POSTPONES POWER PLANT STRIKES 5 DAYS — 'PRODUCTIVE TALKS': Trump called off 48-hr ultimatum Monday, citing 'productive conversations' with Tehran. Kushner + Witkoff talked with 'top person' in Iran Sunday. BUT Iran DENIES all talks — Qalibaf: 'fake news.' IRGC: 'deceitful.' HOWEVER CBS exclusive: Iranian FM official confirms 'received points from US through mediators, being reviewed.' Pakistani-mediated talks reportedly planned later this week. Oil crashed ~14% on announcement. Five-day extension = new deadline ~Friday Mar 28.

LEBANON EXPELS IRANIAN ENVOY — PERSONA NON GRATA: Lebanon FM declared Iranian ambassador persona non grata, must leave by Mar 29. Lebanon blames Hezbollah for dragging country into war. Hezbollah refused government demands to disarm. MOST SIGNIFICANT diplomatic break between Lebanon and Iran in modern history.

TEL AVIV UNINTERCEPTED MISSILE — D25: Iranian missile struck central Tel Aviv Tuesday, ~220 lb warhead, defense systems DID NOT INTERCEPT. 6+ injured. 4 sites struck across Israel. Israeli Knesset session suspended due to incoming missiles. Dimona/Arad revised: 180 wounded (up from 175). Israel intercepted 92% of ballistic missiles overall.

IRANIAN MINES CONFIRMED IN HORMUZ: US officials told CBS at least a dozen underwater mines identified — Iranian-manufactured Maham 3 and Maham 7 Limpet Mines. This adds PHYSICAL dimension to Hormuz blockade beyond naval/missile threat. Mine clearance = weeks/months.

GULF D24-D25: UAE intercepted 7 ballistic + 16 drones D24 (cumul 352 ballistic, 15 cruise, 1,789 drones). Saudi 2 ballistic Riyadh + ~20 drones. Kuwait intercepting, 7 power lines damaged. IRGC attacked 5th Fleet Bahrain. D25: Saudi ~20 drones eastern province. Kuwait continued intercepts.

OIL CRASH + REBOUND: Brent crashed $112→$96.50 Monday (~14% drop) on Trump postponement. WTI $88.13. Dow surged 1,076 pts (+2.4%). D25 REBOUND: Brent climbed above $100 — $101.21 (CNBC), Fortune AM $102.47. Optimism faded as fighting continued unabated. Goldman Sachs: $110 avg March-April; if Hormuz 5% for 10 weeks → exceeds 2008 record ($147).
ZOLGHADR NAMED NEW SNSC SECRETARY: Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr appointed to replace killed Larijani. Signal of regime continuity despite decapitation campaign.

HOUTHI STATUS — ANNOUNCED ENTRY MAR 22 BUT NO CONFIRMED ATTACKS: Houthis declared entry into war, threatened US naval assets in Red Sea. But NO independently confirmed attacks yet as of D25. Maersk/CMA CGM/Hapag-Lloyd suspended all trans-Suez sailings. Still key wild card.

INTERNET BLACKOUT 552+ HOURS — DAY 25: NetBlocks: 'most severe recorded in any country.' Connectivity <1%. Not just social media — total communications shutdown including mobile, SMS, landlines. 'White SIM cards' for regime loyalists only. $35.7M/day. Food nearly tripled. Hospitals at 1/3 capacity.
IEA BIROL: 'WORSE THAN 1973 + 1979 COMBINED' — worst energy crisis statement from IEA head. Goldman: if Hormuz flows 5% for 10 weeks → exceeds $147 (2008 record). Asia imposing fuel-saving measures.

theoryBox: Day 25 — TRUMP BLINKS + LEBANON EXPELS IRAN + TEL AVIV UNINTERCEPTED + MINES IN HORMUZ: Trump postponed power plant strikes 5 days citing 'productive talks.' Iran denies all talks but CBS: FM official confirms 'received points through mediators.' Lebanon expelled Iranian ambassador (persona non grata). Tel Aviv struck by unintercepted missile (~220 lb). Iranian mines confirmed in Hormuz (Maham 3/7). Oil crashed 14% then rebounded above $100 ($101 CNBC). Zolghadr named new SNSC secretary. Internet 552+ hours. Houthis declared entry but no confirmed attacks. Goldman: $110 avg or $147+ if Hormuz persists.

theoryEvaluation.title: TRUMP BLINKS — what the postponement means
theoryEvaluation.body: Trump called off the 48-hr ultimatum — resolved as OPTION B (backs down, not total war). Five key implications: (1) CREDIBILITY DAMAGED: Iran claims 'retreat out of fear.' Future threats carry less weight. (2) DIPLOMATIC OPENING: Pakistani mediation + Kushner/Witkoff engagement + CBS confirmation = first real channel since D1. (3) OIL CRASH/REBOUND: Markets priced in de-escalation (14% drop) then corrected (rebound to $99). Shows extreme sensitivity to diplomatic signals. (4) NEW DEADLINE FRIDAY: Trump's deadlines are 'elastic' — but creates 5-day negotiation window. (5) ISRAEL INDEPENDENT: IDF continuing strikes regardless. Zamir 'HALFWAY.' Israel is NOT party to Trump's de-escalation signal.

theoryEvaluation.title: MINES IN HORMUZ — physical blockade changes everything
theoryEvaluation.body: Iranian Maham 3 and Maham 7 Limpet Mines confirmed in Hormuz. THIS CHANGES THE ENDGAME CALCULUS: (1) Even a ceasefire doesn't reopen Hormuz quickly — mine clearance takes weeks to months. (2) Mines are passive — they threaten shipping even if Iran stops all active military operations. (3) Combined with 3,000+ stranded vessels + port damage + insurance crisis = Hormuz recovery is a MONTHS-long process. (4) Goldman's $147 scenario (Hormuz at 5% for 10 weeks) becomes more plausible because mines ensure flows stay low. (5) Any negotiated deal must include mine clearance framework — this adds enormous complexity.

theoryEvaluation.title: LEBANON EXPELS ENVOY — proxy network fracturing
theoryEvaluation.body: Lebanon declaring Iranian ambassador persona non grata is the MOST SIGNIFICANT diplomatic break in modern Lebanon-Iran relations. Implications: (1) Lebanon officially blaming Hezbollah/Iran for dragging it into war. (2) 865 Hezbollah attack waves = Hezbollah operating autonomously regardless of Lebanese government. (3) Signal to other countries hosting Iranian proxies. (4) Doesn't change military reality (Hezbollah still fighting) but POLITICAL COVER for Iran's regional network is dissolving. (5) Combined with Saudi expulsion (D22) = Iran's diplomatic position weakening across multiple countries simultaneously.

theoryEvaluation.title: IRAN'S DUAL POSTURE — classic negotiating pattern
theoryEvaluation.body: Iran is simultaneously: (a) Publicly denying talks (Qalibaf: 'fake news,' IRGC: 'deceitful'), (b) Privately engaging through mediators (CBS: 'received points, being reviewed'). This is CLASSIC Iranian negotiating behavior — deny engagement while engaging. It serves multiple purposes: (1) Maintains domestic narrative of defiance. (2) Preserves negotiating leverage (not appearing eager). (3) Allows regime to walk away without losing face if talks fail. (4) Tests what mediators can offer before committing. The CBS exclusive is the most important signal — it confirms Iran HAS received and IS reviewing US proposals through intermediaries.

endstate_fa.title: محتمل‌ترین (۳۰٪)
endstate_fa.body: فرسایشی — افزایش ۲۴→۳۰. #۱ حالا. ترامپ عقب‌نشینی = ادامه بدون تشدید. مین = انسداد. زامیر 'نیمه راه.'

endstate_fa.title: دوم (۲۵٪)
endstate_fa.body: تشدید — کاهش ۳۷→۲۵. نیروگاه تعویق. کانال دیپلماتیک. اما تل‌آویو + مین + حوثی. جمعه کلیدی.

endstate_fa.title: سوم (۱۸٪)
endstate_fa.body: اعلام پیروزی — افزایش ۱۱→۱۸. ترامپ خروج. 'مذاکرات سازنده.' پاکستان. AJ: 'خروج آبرومندانه.'

endstate_fa.title: نوظهور (۱۲٪)
endstate_fa.body: مداخله — کاهش ۱۷→۱۲. تعویق = کاهش فوریت. IEA 'بدترین.' اما دوجانبه.
